definition: fruit-bearing, fruitful , (Aeschulus Tragicus), etc.:—; κάρπιμα, τά, fruit-trees  or corn-fields , (Aristophanes Comicus); κάρπιμα ἀγαθά property that yields a produce , opposite to ἄκαρπα, (Aristotle Philosopher):—;metaphorically, τῶν ξένων τοὺς κ. rich foreigners from whom money can be wrung , (Aristophanes Comicus) (ML)
